data.title: Sanuwave's Q2 FY2025 revenues hit $10.2 million, up 42% from $7.2 million in Q2 FY2024. Company aims for $12-$12.7 million in Q3 FY2025.
data.description: Sanuwave Health, Inc. reported Q2 2025 revenues of $10.2 million, a 42% increase from $7.2 million in Q2 2024, marking their highest Q2 quarterly revenues. The Q2 2025 gross margin was 78.3% (up from 73.2% in Q2 2024) with an operating income of $1.9 million (versus $2.0 million in Q2 2024). The company sold 116 UltraMist systems in Q2 2025, up from 72 in Q2 2024. Q2 2025 included equity compensation costs of $1.1 million. The company forecasts revenues of $12-$12.7 million for Q3 2025 and projects a full year 2025 revenue of $48-$50 million (a 47-53% increase from 2024). Adjusted EBITDA for Q2 2025 was $3.4 million, up from $1.5 million in Q2 2024. CEO Morgan Frank anticipates breakout performance in Q4 2025 and 2026 after building up sales and commercial operations teams. The Company's total assets amounted to $33,046 at June 30, 2025.

data.title: Strawberry Fields REIT reports strong Q2 results: $20.0M FFO, $18.9M AFFO, $8.7M net income. Acquisitions boost rental income to $37.9M. CEO optimistic about company's growth.
data.description: Strawberry Fields REIT, Inc. reported its Q2 results for 2025 with financial highlights including 100% of contractual rents collected. They acquired a skilled nursing facility in Texas for $11.5 million and nine more facilities in Missouri for $59 million. The company also issued $90 million in Series B Bonds and used $30 million to pay down debt. For the quarter, FFO was $20 million, AFFO $18.9 million, net income $8.7 million, and rental income $37.9 million. In the first six months of 2025, FFO was $38.2 million, AFFO $35.2 million, net income $15.7 million, and rental income $75.2 million. The CEO noted strong earnings and growth opportunities. Net income increased to $8.7 million in Q2 from $7.2 million in 2024, primarily from higher rental income. For the six months, net income was $15.7 million in 2025 versus $13 million in 2024. The article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: 13 top press releases in July, incl. Princess Cruises packages, BuzzBallz pool, and inaugural TIME100 Creators List. NEW YORK, Aug. 8, 2025.
data.description: New offerings have been launched by Princess Cruises, BuzzBallz has released a new pool product, and TIME100 Creators List has made its debut. The news broke in New York on August 8, 2025. Amid the influx of press releases flooding PR Newswire monthly, it's a challenge for journalists to stay updated. The latest updates include thousands of new packages from Princess Cruises, a new pool product from BuzzBallz, and the introduction of the inaugural TIME100 Creators List.

data.title: ChipMOS reported its July 2025 revenue. Stock Exchange: 8150,Taiwan Stock Exchange, Nasdaq: IMOS.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, in Hsinchu, ChipMOS TECHNOLOGIES INC. (Taiwan Stock Exchange: 8150 and Nasdaq: IMOS), a top provider of outsourced semiconductor assembly and test services ("OSAT"), released its unaudited consolidated financial results.

data.title: Heron Therapeutics reschedules Q2 earnings release to Aug 8, 2025. (Nasdaq: HRTX) Company is a biotech entity.
data.description: In Cary, North Carolina, on August 8, 2025, Heron Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: HRTX), a biotechnology firm, has decided to postpone the disclosure of its second quarter financial results for 2025 along with the accompanying conference call. The company will provide a new date for the release shortly.

data.title: ZKH Group Limited will announce Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 22, 2025. Leader in China's MRO procurement. NYSE: ZKH.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, ZKH Group Limited, a prominent maintenance, repair, and operations (MRO) procurement service platform in China, revealed that it would unveil its unaudited financial results for the second quarter of 2025. ZKH, traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ZKH, is a key player in the industry. Stakeholders and investors are eagerly anticipating the release of these financial figures.

data.title: Pye-Barker Fire & Safety acquires Fire-X and Fire Protection Products in Maryland, expanding its offerings.
data.description: Atlanta-based Pye-Barker Fire & Safety, the biggest fully integrated fire protection, life safety, and security services provider in the US, recently announced the acquisition of Fire-X Sales and Service Corp. and its affiliate, Fire Protection Products. This acquisition further solidifies Pye-Barker's position in the market and expands its reach. The company now boasts an even larger customer base and an enhanced portfolio of services, strengthening its presence in the industry.

data.title: X Financial (NYSE: XYF) to release Q2 2025 financial results on August 19, 2025. Company is based in China.
data.description: Shenzhen, China, August 8, 2025 - X Financial (NYSE: XYF), a prominent online personal finance company in China, revealed plans to unveil its unaudited financial performance for the second quarter closing on June 30, 2025. These results will be released before the commencement of U.S. markets.

data.title: Specialty Feed Additives Market expected to reach $21.01 billion by 2030 with a projected annual growth of 4.6%.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, a report from MarketsandMarkets™ reveals that the specialty feed additives market is valued at approximately USD 16.81 billion in 2025. Projections indicate that this market is expected to grow to around USD 21.01 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.6% from 2025 to 2030. Specialty feed additives play a crucial role in various sectors and are likely to witness steady expansion in the coming years.

data.title: By 2025, less than 1 million individuals, or under 0.02% of the world's population, own a full Bitcoin, including fewer in the crypto community.
data.description: Less than 1 million individuals worldwide possess a complete Bitcoin, representing less than 0.02% of the global population. The number is even smaller within the cryptocurrency community.

data.title: Truecaller surpasses 100M monthly active users in the Middle East and Africa, August 2025.
data.description: In August 2025, Truecaller, a top global platform for contact verification and blocking unwanted communications, achieved a major milestone as its monthly active user base in the MEA-region surpassed 100 million for Android and iOS users.

data.title: RemeGen's RC148 bispecific antibody gets FDA approval for Phase II US clinical trial. Clearing IND application on Aug 8th.
data.description: In Yantai, China, on August 8, 2025, RemeGen Co., Ltd. (688331.SH/09995.HK) made public the approval of its Investigational New Drug (IND) application by the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) in the United States. This clearance is for the commencement of phase II clinical trials for RC148, a bispecific antibody developed by RemeGen Co., Ltd. The trials will focus on evaluating the effectiveness of RC148 in treating a specific condition.

data.title: Trianz's Concierto MANAGE platform now officially AWS Cloud Operations Software Competency, as of Aug 8, 2025.
data.description: In Santa Clara, California on August 8, 2025, a leading digital transformation software and solutions provider, Trianz, disclosed that its Cloud Management platform, Concierto MANAGE, has successfully obtained recognition as an Amazon Web Services (AWS) Cloud Operations Software Competency holder. This significant accomplishment represents Trianz's dedication to advancing in cloud operations, enabling improved services for clients in the digital transformation space.

data.title: GPTBots now integrates GPT-5 to enhance enterprise AI with expert-level intelligence and multi-agent collaboration, solving complex challenges with advanced reasoning.
data.description: Enhance enterprise AI agents using GPTBots and OpenAI's GPT-5 to achieve smarter solutions. Improve advanced reasoning capabilities and decrease errors to effectively tackle complex problems.

data.title: Binance partners with Spain's 2nd-largest bank BBVA to secure trader margin in treasuries, aiming to reduce risk.
data.description: The biggest cryptocurrency exchange globally has partnered with BBVA to regain trust and reduce counterparty risk.
UK 10-Year Real Yields Set to Close the Week at Highest Level in a Week

data.title: WuXi XDC (stock code: 2268.HK) has been included in the MSCI China All Share Index, a leading CRDMO - Aug. 8, 2025.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, WuXi XDC Cayman Inc. (stock code: 2268.HK) based in Shanghai, a prominent Contract Research, Development, and Manufacturing Organization specializing in the bioconjugate sector, revealed its addition to the MSCI China All Share Index.

data.title: New VIXI ETF by Defiance offers enhanced long volatility with short S&P 500 leverage.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global economy is projected to grow by approximately 4.5% in the upcoming year. The United States is expected to see a growth rate of around 5%, surpassing the overall global average. Additionally, China is forecasted to experience a growth rate of about 8% in the same period, showing significant resilience and recovery from the impact of the pandemic. These numbers indicate a positive trend in the world economy, with key players like the US and China driving growth and stability.

data.title: QuickBooks AI marketing tool with Mailchimp automation named top by Better Business Advice, for small businesses.
data.description: In a recent announcement on August 8, 2025, Better Business Advice named QuickBooks as one of the leading AI marketing tools of the year. This recognition highlighted the new Mailchimp-powered marketing agent as a notable advancement for small and mid-sized businesses seeking to enhance their personalized marketing strategies. QuickBooks' innovative approach has garnered attention as a key tool for companies striving to expand their marketing efforts effectively.
